title: Italian Courgette Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy stir fry recipe that combines the flavors of Italy with the crunch of courgette. This dish is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the courgette and cook for 3-4 minutes, until tender.
Stir in the Italian seasoning, salt, and red pepper flakes.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the flavors are combined.
Stir in the chopped basil and serve hot.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional basil if desired.
